document.title: Needs Receipts Demo
document.text:
# Needs Receipts Demo

## Abstract

Users strongly prefer CappinCheck over existing review tools. CappinCheck is the first tool to audit scientific claims with agents.

## Deployment

CappinCheck is safe for production use in regulated environments.

## Evidence

This short document intentionally does not include a user study, benchmark, safety evaluation, production deployment study, prior-work comparison, or external validation.

claims.claim: Users strongly prefer CappinCheck over existing review tools.
claims.why_risky: Preference claims need user study data or survey evidence.
claims.audit_question: Does the document report a user study, sample size, or preference measurement?

claims.claim: CappinCheck is safe for production use in regulated environments.
claims.why_risky: Safety and regulated-production claims require concrete validation and scope.
claims.audit_question: Does the document provide safety evaluation, threat model, or deployment evidence?

claims.claim: CappinCheck is the first tool to audit scientific claims with agents.
claims.audit_question: Does the document provide a literature or product comparison supporting the firstness claim?
